searches.topic: AI Recording Devices / Wearable Audio Capture

searches.venues: NeurIPS, ICLR, ICML, AAAI, CVPR, ACL, EMNLP

searches.topic: Automated MCU firmware generation and flashing across ESP32, STM32, and nRF platforms
searches.venues: RTSS, ASP-DAC, USENIX Security, NDSS, CCS, MILCOM, SECON, ICCCN, ISLPED

searches.topic: Automated MCU firmware generation and flashing across ESP32, STM32, and nRF platforms
searches.venues: MoDELS, USENIX Security, RTSS, ASP-DAC, NDSS, MILCOM, SECON, ISLPED

searches.topic: PCB硬件自动化流程(面向 IoT传感器板)
searches.venues: MLCAD, ASP-DAC, DAC, IEEE TCAD, IEEE TVLSI, IEEE Trans. Reliability, IEEE Access, Integration, arXiv

papers.title: Platform-Specific Code Generation from Platform-Independent Timed Models
papers.summary_en: Generates platform-specific code from platform-independent timed models, showing how model-based synthesis can preserve timing constraints while targeting embedded deployments. The paper matters here because it is one of the cleanest top-venue examples of turning abstract logic into MCU-ready firmware artifacts instead of hand-coding board-specific behavior.
papers.summary_zh: 该工作从平台无关的有时序模型生成平台特定代码，说明模型驱动综合可以在满足时序约束的同时面向嵌入式部署输出可执行工件。它之所以与本题相关，是因为它给出了一个顶会层面的范式：把抽象逻辑自动落到 MCU 可部署的软件，而不是手工编写板级特定代码。
papers.topic: Automated MCU firmware generation and flashing across ESP32, STM32, and nRF platforms

papers.title: Automatic generation of hardware dependent software for MPSoCs from abstract system specifications
papers.summary_en: Synthesizes hardware-dependent software from abstract MPSoC specifications, which is a foundational predecessor to modern firmware generation pipelines. It is relevant because the same abstraction gap exists on ESP32, STM32, and nRF projects: once the hardware contract is formalized, code generation can absorb a lot of board-specific glue.
papers.summary_zh: 该工作从抽象的 MPSoC 规格自动综合出与硬件相关的软件，是现代固件生成流水线的早期基础。它与 ESP32、STM32、nRF 的现实工程问题高度相似：一旦把硬件契约形式化，很多板级胶水代码就可以被自动化的代码生成吸收掉。
papers.topic: Automated MCU firmware generation and flashing across ESP32, STM32, and nRF platforms

papers.title: RapidPatch: Firmware Hotpatching for Real-Time Embedded Devices
papers.summary_en: Introduces firmware hotpatching for real-time embedded devices, aiming to update code without breaking timing guarantees or rebooting the system. The technical significance is that it moves embedded firmware maintenance from full reflash cycles toward surgical patch injection, which is closer to how production fleets need to be serviced.
papers.summary_zh: 该工作提出面向实时嵌入式设备的固件热补丁，目标是在不破坏时序约束、也不重启系统的前提下更新代码。其技术意义在于把嵌入式固件维护从整机重刷推进到更细粒度的补丁注入，这更接近量产设备车队的实际运维需求。
papers.topic: Automated MCU firmware generation and flashing across ESP32, STM32, and nRF platforms

papers.title: HERA: Hotpatching of Embedded Real-time Applications
papers.summary_en: Presents a hotpatching approach for embedded real-time applications, focusing on preserving system correctness while patching live code. It is an important bridge paper because it shows the mechanics needed when firmware must stay online and deterministic, which is exactly the constraint that makes flashing difficult on small MCUs.
papers.summary_zh: 该工作针对嵌入式实时应用提出热补丁方法，重点是在在线修补代码时维持系统正确性。它的重要性在于给出了在设备必须保持在线且可预测的情况下如何打补丁的机制，这正是小型 MCU 上刷写困难的根本约束。
papers.topic: Automated MCU firmware generation and flashing across ESP32, STM32, and nRF platforms

papers.title: From Library Portability to Para-rehosting: Natively Executing Microcontroller Software on Commodity Hardware
papers.summary_en: Shows how microcontroller software can be executed on commodity hardware by removing or adapting hardware dependencies, enabling faster testing and analysis loops. For firmware generation and flashing workflows, this matters because re-hosting can accelerate build-test-debug cycles before the code ever reaches an ESP32, STM32, or nRF board.
papers.summary_zh: 该工作通过移除或适配硬件依赖，让微控制器软件能在通用硬件上原生执行，从而加速测试和分析闭环。对固件生成与刷写流水线来说，这很关键，因为重宿主化可以在代码真正下发到 ESP32、STM32 或 nRF 板子之前，就显著缩短构建-测试-调试周期。
papers.topic: Automated MCU firmware generation and flashing across ESP32, STM32, and nRF platforms

papers.title: SOTA: Secure Over-The-Air Programming of IoT Devices
papers.summary_en: Builds a secure over-the-air programming pipeline for IoT devices, emphasizing authenticated delivery and update safety instead of raw flashing speed. It matters because the real deployment problem on MCU fleets is not only how to program a chip, but how to do so safely at scale with recoverability and trust.
papers.summary_zh: 该工作为 IoT 设备构建了安全 OTA 编程流程，重点是认证分发与更新安全，而不只是刷写速度。它之所以重要，是因为 MCU 车队的真实部署问题不仅是“如何写进芯片”，更是如何在规模化场景下保证可恢复性和信任链。
papers.topic: Automated MCU firmware generation and flashing across ESP32, STM32, and nRF platforms

papers.title: Remote progressive firmware update for flash-based networked embedded systems
papers.summary_en: Presents progressive remote firmware update for flash-based embedded systems, reducing the operational burden of full-image replacement on constrained devices. It is directly relevant to flashing workflows because it treats firmware delivery as an incremental, energy-aware transport problem rather than a one-shot programmer transaction.
papers.summary_zh: 该工作面向基于 Flash 的嵌入式系统提出渐进式远程固件更新，降低了受限设备整包替换的运维负担。它与刷写流程直接相关，因为它把固件交付视为增量式、能耗敏感的传输问题，而不是一次性的编程器事务。
papers.topic: Automated MCU firmware generation and flashing across ESP32, STM32, and nRF platforms

papers.title: No-reboot and zero-flash over-the-air programming for Wireless Sensor Networks
papers.summary_en: Proposes zero-flash, no-reboot OTA programming for wireless sensor networks, directly targeting the pain point of updating tiny nodes with limited flash and no downtime budget. The paper is a strong reminder that automated flashing on MCUs is mostly a resource-management problem: boot-time, flash space, and network reliability dominate the update protocol.
papers.summary_zh: 该工作提出无需重启、无需额外 Flash 的 OTA 编程方案，直接针对 Flash 资源紧张且不能停机的无线传感节点。它提醒我们，MCU 上的自动化刷写本质上是资源管理问题：启动时间、Flash 容量和网络可靠性共同决定了更新协议。
papers.topic: Automated MCU firmware generation and flashing across ESP32, STM32, and nRF platforms

papers.title: AutoPatch: Automated Generation of Hotpatches for Real-Time Embedded Devices
papers.summary_en: Automates the generation of hotpatches for real-time embedded devices, pushing the hotpatching idea toward a more end-to-end pipeline. It is not yet venue-confirmed, but it is highly relevant because it explicitly targets the missing automation layer between vulnerability discovery, patch synthesis, and deployment on constrained hardware.
papers.summary_zh: 该工作自动生成实时嵌入式设备的热补丁，把热补丁思想进一步推进到更端到端的流水线。它尚未进入正式顶会发表，但相关性很强，因为它明确瞄准了“漏洞发现、补丁合成、受限硬件部署”之间缺失的自动化层。
papers.topic: Automated MCU firmware generation and flashing across ESP32, STM32, and nRF platforms

papers.title: SAMoSA: Sensing Activities with Motion and Subsampled Audio
papers.summary_en: Smartwatch system combining IMU at 50 Hz with audio subsampled below 1 kHz, rendering speech content unintelligible for privacy while achieving 92.2% activity recognition accuracy across 26 daily activities. The key insight is that subsampling audio below the Nyquist frequency for speech (≈8 kHz) destroys intelligibility while preserving envelope features useful for activity classification.
papers.summary_zh: 将智能手表的IMU（50Hz）与低于1kHz的下采样音频结合，在保护语音隐私的同时对26种日常活动实现92.2%的识别精度。核心洞见是：低于语音奈奎斯特频率（约8kHz）的下采样会破坏语音可懂度，同时保留对活动分类有用的包络特征，直接对应AI录音设备的核心隐私-功效权衡问题。
papers.topic: AI Recording Devices / Wearable Audio Capture

papers.title: Kirigami: Lightweight Speech Filtering for Privacy-Preserving Activity Recognition using Audio
papers.summary_en: Exposes that fine-tuned ASR can recover speech from supposedly private audio features (39.99% PER), invalidating previous privacy assumptions. Proposes an on-device ML filter that strips speech segments before any cloud upload while maintaining 76% activity recognition accuracy, deployable on IoT microcontrollers with <5ms latency.
papers.summary_zh: 揭示现有隐私音频特征仍可被ASR还原语音（音素错误率39.99%），使此前的隐私假设失效。提出Kirigami轻量过滤器，在上传前去除语音段，保持76%活动识别精度，可在IoT微控制器上以<5ms延迟运行，直接应对AI录音设备的隐私泄露风险。
papers.topic: AI Recording Devices / Wearable Audio Capture

papers.title: Powering for Privacy: Improving User Trust in Smart Speaker Microphones with Intentional Powering and Perceptible Assurance
papers.summary_en: Hardware design tying microphone power to physical user controls with visible/tactile feedback, allowing users to physically verify whether the mic is truly off. The study shows that adding perceptible power indicators significantly increases user trust in always-on listening devices — directly addressing the trust problem in AI recording pendants.
papers.summary_zh: 将麦克风供电与物理开关绑定并提供可感知反馈（视觉/触觉），让用户能真正验证麦克风是否关闭。研究表明添加可感知电源指示器显著提升用户对持续监听设备的信任度，直接解决Omi、Limitless等AI录音穿戴设备面临的「是否在录音」信任危机。
papers.topic: AI Recording Devices / Wearable Audio Capture

papers.title: Privacy-Aware Ambient Audio Sensing for Healthy Indoor Spaces
papers.summary_en: Framework for continuous ambient audio monitoring that detects environmental health signals (air quality proxies, occupancy, ventilation) while suppressing personally identifiable speech content using privacy-preserving feature extraction. Demonstrates that environmental sensing and speech privacy are not mutually exclusive when the right acoustic features are selected.
papers.summary_zh: 持续环境音频监控框架，通过隐私保护特征提取检测室内健康信号（空气质量、人员占用、通风），同时过滤可识别个人身份的语音内容。证明在选择正确声学特征的前提下，环境感知与语音隐私保护并不相互排斥，为总是开着的AI录音传感器提供设计范式。
papers.topic: AI Recording Devices / Wearable Audio Capture

papers.title: WearSE: Enabling Streaming Speech Enhancement on Eyewear Using Acoustic Sensing
papers.summary_en: Real-time streaming speech enhancement on smart glasses using acoustic sensing, enabling clean audio capture in noisy environments on wearable hardware with low latency. The system leverages bone conduction and air conduction microphone fusion to isolate the wearer's voice from background noise without cloud dependency.
papers.summary_zh: 智能眼镜上的实时语音增强系统，通过声学传感改善嘈杂环境下的音频捕获质量，低延迟部署在可穿戴硬件上。系统利用骨传导与气导麦克风融合，无需云端即可从背景噪音中分离佩戴者语音，解决AI录音穿戴设备的现实录音质量问题。
papers.topic: AI Recording Devices / Wearable Audio Capture

papers.title: SVoice: Enabling Voice Communication in Silence via Acoustic Sensing on Commodity Devices
papers.summary_en: Reconstructs audible speech from silent mouth gestures via ultrasound acoustic sensing on smartphones (7.62% CER), using an inverse-task training paradigm with phone call recordings as supervision. This provides a privacy-friendly speech capture alternative that works without an open microphone — relevant to scenarios where users want AI assistance without broadcasting audio.
papers.summary_zh: 通过手机超声波感知从无声口型重建可听语音（字符错误率7.62%），用通话录音作为逆任务训练数据。提供了无需开放麦克风的隐私友好语音采集替代方案，适用于用户希望获得AI辅助同时避免广播音频的场景，为AI录音设备的隐私设计提供了新思路。
papers.topic: AI Recording Devices / Wearable Audio Capture

papers.title: Lipwatch: Enabling Silent Speech Recognition on Smartwatches using Acoustic Sensing
papers.summary_en: Smartwatch captures silent lip movements via acoustic sensing for private speech recognition without an open microphone, enabling private voice input from the wrist. The system uses ultrasonic signals reflected from the lip and jaw to reconstruct phoneme sequences, achieving practical WER without requiring the wearer to speak aloud.
papers.summary_zh: 智能手表通过声学传感捕获无声唇动实现私密语音识别，无需开放麦克风，为AI录音设备提供了隐私友好的腕部语音输入替代方案。系统利用超声信号从嘴唇和下颌反射重建音素序列，在不要求佩戴者出声的情况下达到实用词错误率。
papers.topic: AI Recording Devices / Wearable Audio Capture

papers.title: VAX: Using Existing Video and Audio-based Activity Recognition Models to Bootstrap Privacy-Sensitive Sensors
papers.summary_en: Cross-modality transfer learning using audio/video model labels to train privacy-preserving sensors (radar, IMU), achieving 84% accuracy on 17 daily activities without continuous audio collection. The cross-modal bootstrapping approach directly addresses the labeled data bottleneck for privacy-sensitive sensors in AI recording device research.
papers.summary_zh: 用音视频模型标注训练隐私安全传感器（雷达、IMU），对17种日常活动达84%精度，无需持续音频采集。跨模态引导方法直接解决AI录音设备研究中隐私敏感传感器的标注数据瓶颈，为用传统传感器替代开放麦克风提供了知识迁移路径。
papers.topic: AI Recording Devices / Wearable Audio Capture

papers.title: FeatureSense: Protecting Speaker Attributes in Always-On Audio Sensing System
papers.summary_en: Open-source library for always-on audio sensing that adaptively selects features to prevent inferring speaker age, gender, and identity while preserving downstream task utility, outperforming prior methods by 60.6%. The adaptive feature selection mechanism responds to changing acoustic conditions and attacker capabilities, making it robust to adaptive adversaries.
papers.summary_zh: 面向持续开启音频感知的开源隐私保护库，自适应选择特征以防止推断说话者年龄、性别和身份，同时保留感知任务效用，比现有方法提升60.6%。自适应特征选择机制对变化的声学条件和攻击者能力做出响应，对自适应对手具有鲁棒性，直接针对AI录音设备的属性泄露问题。
papers.topic: AI Recording Devices / Wearable Audio Capture

papers.title: EgoTrigger: Toward Audio-Driven Image Capture for Human Memory Enhancement in All-Day Energy-Efficient Smart Glasses
papers.summary_en: Smart glasses system using lightweight audio models to detect hand-object interaction sounds and trigger camera capture at semantically meaningful moments, reducing captured frames by 54% while maintaining memory task utility. The energy-efficient design demonstrates that audio-driven selective capture is a viable strategy for all-day wearable lifelogging.
papers.summary_zh: 智能眼镜用轻量音频模型检测手-物体交互声（开抽屉、开药瓶）来触发摄像，语义相关帧减少54%同时保持记忆辅助效用。节能设计证明音频驱动的选择性捕获是全天候可穿戴生活记录的可行策略，与Omi/Limitless等AI录音吊坠的设计理念高度一致。
papers.topic: AI Recording Devices / Wearable Audio Capture

papers.title: VoxCare: Studying Natural Communication Behaviors of Hospital Caregivers through Wearable Sensing of Egocentric Audio
papers.summary_en: Longitudinal field study deploying wearable egocentric audio recorders on hospital caregivers to capture and analyze natural communication patterns including speech acts, diarization, and paralinguistics. The deployment reveals practical challenges in always-on audio recording in high-noise clinical environments, offering valuable design lessons for AI recording wearables.
papers.summary_zh: 在医院护理人员身上部署可穿戴自我中心音频记录仪进行纵向实地研究，分析自然沟通模式（话语行为、说话人分离、副语言）。部署揭示了在高噪音临床环境中持续开启音频记录的实际挑战，为AI录音穿戴设备提供了宝贵的设计经验。
papers.topic: AI Recording Devices / Wearable Audio Capture

papers.title: MobiLoRA: Accelerating LoRA-based LLM Inference on Mobile Devices via Context-aware KV Cache Optimization
papers.summary_en: Optimizes LoRA-based LLM inference on mobile devices by dynamically managing KV cache based on context patterns, reducing memory overhead while maintaining generation quality on resource-constrained hardware. The context-aware eviction policy selectively retains attention heads that contribute most to the current generation prefix.
papers.summary_zh: 通过基于上下文模式的动态KV缓存管理，优化移动设备上LoRA微调LLM的推理效率。上下文感知淘汰策略选择性保留对当前生成前缀贡献最大的注意力头，在资源受限硬件上降低内存开销同时保持生成质量。
papers.topic: On-Device LLM Inference

papers.title: LinguaLinked: Distributed Large Language Model Inference on Mobile Devices
papers.summary_en: Distributes LLM inference across multiple mobile devices by partitioning model layers and scheduling inter-device communication to minimize latency, enabling large models to run on commodity phones without cloud dependency. The load-balancing scheduler accounts for heterogeneous device capabilities and variable network conditions.
papers.summary_zh: 通过层间切分和设备间通信调度将LLM推理分布到多台移动设备，使大模型无需依赖云端即可在普通手机上运行。负载均衡调度器考虑了异构设备能力和可变网络条件，提供了设备端协作推理的完整系统框架。
papers.topic: On-Device LLM Inference

papers.title: NoMAD-Attention: Efficient LLM Inference on CPUs Through Multiply-add-free Attention
papers.summary_en: Eliminates multiply-add operations in attention computation for CPU inference by replacing them with lookup tables and bit operations, achieving significant speedup for LLM inference on CPU-only consumer devices. The approach exploits the structure of quantized weight matrices to enable table-lookup-based dot products.
papers.summary_zh: 通过查找表和位运算替代注意力计算中的乘加操作，显著加速纯CPU设备上的LLM推理。方法利用量化权重矩阵的结构实现基于表查找的点积运算，为无GPU消费级设备的on-device推理提供了高效解决方案。
papers.topic: On-Device LLM Inference

papers.title: ArkVale: Efficient Generative LLM Inference with Recallable Key-Value Eviction
papers.summary_en: Introduces recallable KV eviction for memory-efficient LLM inference: evicts KV cache pages to secondary storage but can recall them when needed based on attention scores, balancing memory constraints with generation quality for long-context on-device use. The recall mechanism uses a lightweight importance predictor trained on attention patterns.
papers.summary_zh: 提出可召回KV淘汰机制：基于注意力分数将KV缓存页面淘汰到二级存储，需要时可按需召回。轻量重要性预测器基于注意力模式训练，在内存限制和生成质量之间取得平衡，适合内存受限设备端的长上下文推理。
papers.topic: On-Device LLM Inference

papers.title: Agile-Quant: Activation-Guided Quantization for Faster Inference of LLMs on the Edge
papers.summary_en: Activation-guided quantization framework for edge LLMs that analyzes activation distributions to assign optimal per-layer bit-widths, achieving faster edge inference with minimal accuracy degradation. The agile quantization search space is pruned using activation statistics computed from a small calibration set.
papers.summary_zh: 面向边缘设备的激活引导LLM量化框架，通过分析激活分布为每层分配最优比特宽度。量化搜索空间用从小型校准集计算的激活统计量进行剪枝，在最小精度损失下显著加速边缘设备推理。
papers.topic: On-Device LLM Inference

papers.title: Megalodon: Efficient LLM Pretraining and Inference with Unlimited Context Length
papers.summary_en: Proposes linear-complexity attention using exponential moving average gating to enable unlimited context length inference at O(n) cost, outperforming Llama-2 in both efficiency and capability for long-document on-device processing. The CEMA (complex exponential moving average) module provides implicit positional encoding without explicit position embeddings.
papers.summary_zh: 提出使用指数移动平均门控的线性复杂度注意力机制，以O(n)代价实现无限上下文推理。CEMA（复指数移动平均）模块提供无需显式位置嵌入的隐式位置编码，推理效率和模型能力均优于Llama-2，适合长文档的设备端处理场景。
papers.topic: On-Device LLM Inference

papers.title: A Drop-In Solution for On-the-Fly Adaptation of Speculative Decoding in Large Language Models
papers.summary_en: Plug-and-play adaptation for speculative decoding that dynamically adjusts draft model behavior during inference without retraining, improving acceptance rates and throughput across diverse LLM deployments. The on-the-fly calibration mechanism updates the draft model's token probability distributions based on recent acceptance patterns.
papers.summary_zh: 无需重训练的即插即用推测解码自适应方法，在推理过程中动态调整草稿模型行为。实时校准机制基于近期接受模式更新草稿模型的token概率分布，提升接受率和吞吐量，有效降低LLM推理延迟。
papers.topic: On-Device LLM Inference

papers.title: MASSV: Multimodal Adaptation and Self-Data Distillation for Speculative Decoding of Vision-Language Models
papers.summary_en: Adapts speculative decoding to vision-language models via self-data distillation, generating draft tokens that account for both visual and text modalities to accelerate VLM inference without dedicated draft models. The self-distillation pipeline bootstraps from the target VLM's own outputs to avoid the cost of training separate draft models.
papers.summary_zh: 通过自数据蒸馏将推测解码适配到视觉语言模型，生成兼顾视觉和文本模态的草稿token，无需专用草稿模型即可加速VLM推理。自蒸馏流程从目标VLM自身输出引导，避免了训练独立草稿模型的成本。
papers.topic: On-Device LLM Inference

papers.title: LIME: Accelerating Collaborative Lossless LLM Inference on Memory-Constrained Edge Devices
papers.summary_en: Collaborative lossless inference system for multiple edge devices using interleaved pipeline parallelism and model offloading, with fine-grained memory allocation achieving 1.7x–3.7x speedups on Jetson devices. The interleaved scheduling eliminates pipeline bubbles by overlapping computation across adjacent model segments on neighboring devices.
papers.summary_zh: 面向多边缘设备的无损协作LLM推理系统，采用交错流水线并行和模型分载，细粒度内存分配在Jetson设备上实现1.7x-3.7x加速。交错调度通过在相邻设备上的相邻模型段重叠计算来消除流水线气泡。
papers.topic: On-Device LLM Inference

papers.title: Vec-LUT: Vector Table Lookup for Parallel Ultra-Low-Bit LLM Inference on Edge Devices
papers.summary_en: Vector lookup paradigm for ultra-low-bit LLM inference on edge devices, with vector-centric tensor layout and cache-aware techniques achieving 4.2x speedup over baselines across diverse edge hardware. The key insight is grouping weight bits to form vector indices that map to precomputed result tables, enabling SIMD-parallel table lookups.
papers.summary_zh: 面向边缘设备超低比特LLM推理的向量查找表范式，通过向量中心张量布局和缓存感知技术，在多种边缘硬件上实现比基线快4.2倍的推理速度。核心洞见是将权重比特分组形成向量索引，映射到预计算结果表，实现SIMD并行表查找。
papers.topic: On-Device LLM Inference

papers.title: ShadowNPU: System and Algorithm Co-design for NPU-Centric On-Device LLM Inference
papers.summary_en: NPU-centric on-device LLM inference system using sparse attention with pilot compute to minimize CPU/GPU fallback, featuring compute graph bucketing and per-head sparsity for high accuracy on mobile NPUs. The pilot compute mechanism pre-estimates which attention heads need full computation versus sparse approximation.
papers.summary_zh: 以NPU为中心的设备端LLM推理系统，通过稀疏注意力的领航计算最小化CPU/GPU回退，采用计算图分桶和逐头稀疏策略。领航计算机制预估哪些注意力头需要全量计算，哪些可以稀疏近似，在移动NPU上实现高精度高效率推理。
papers.topic: On-Device LLM Inference

papers.title: TRAMBA: A Hybrid Transformer and Mamba Architecture for Practical Audio and Bone Conduction Speech Super Resolution and Enhancement on Mobile and Wearable Platforms
papers.summary_en: TRAMBA presents a hybrid Transformer-Mamba architecture for real-time bone conduction and audio speech enhancement on mobile and wearable devices. A two-stage training strategy—pretraining on standard audio datasets, fine-tuning on limited bone conduction data—achieves up to 7.3% PESQ improvement with a memory footprint under 20 MB. The 465× inference speedup over GAN baselines enables practical always-on deployment on battery-constrained earbuds and smartwatches.
papers.summary_zh: TRAMBA 将 Transformer 与 Mamba 架构混合，专为可穿戴平台设计骨传导与音频语音增强系统。采用「先在音频数据预训练、再用少量骨传导数据微调」的两阶段训练，PESQ 提升 7.3%，模型仅需 20 MB 内存。推理速度比 GAN 基线快 465 倍，可在耳机和智能手表等低功耗设备上常时运行，实用性强。
papers.topic: Wearable Audio Sensing / Speech Enhancement

papers.title: The Power of Speech in the Wild: Discriminative Power of Daily Voice Diaries in Understanding Auditory Verbal Hallucinations Using Deep Learning
papers.summary_en: This paper leverages passive voice diary data captured by wearable devices in daily life to detect and characterize auditory verbal hallucinations (AVH) in psychiatric patients via deep learning. Naturalistic speech recordings are analyzed to extract discriminative acoustic features differentiating AVH-active periods from baseline, achieving strong classification accuracy on a real-world clinical dataset. The work demonstrates that wearable-captured ambient speech contains rich diagnostic signals for mental health monitoring without requiring intrusive clinical measurement.
papers.summary_zh: 本文利用可穿戴设备采集的日常语音日记，通过深度学习检测精神病患者的语音幻觉（AVH）现象。自然场景下持续录制的语音被用于提取区分 AVH 活跃期与基线期的声学特征，在真实临床数据集上取得较强分类精度。研究表明，可穿戴设备采集的环境语音蕴含丰富的心理健康诊断信号，无需侵入性临床测量即可支持持续监测。
papers.topic: Wearable Audio Sensing / Speech Enhancement

papers.title: EarSE: Bringing Robust Speech Enhancement to COTS Headphones
papers.summary_en: EarSE addresses the challenge of deploying speech enhancement on commercial off-the-shelf (COTS) headphones without hardware modifications or specialized chipsets. The system leverages acoustic sensing from standard headphone microphones and a lightweight neural model to achieve noise suppression and voice clarity improvement on existing consumer hardware. Evaluation across diverse noise conditions shows significant word error rate reduction, making COTS headphones viable for robust speech capture without custom silicon.
papers.summary_zh: EarSE 解决了在商用现成耳机（COTS）上无需硬件改造部署语音增强的难题。系统利用标准耳机麦克风声学感知和轻量神经网络，在现有消费硬件上实现降噪和语音清晰度提升。在多种噪声条件下的评测表明词错率显著降低，无需定制芯片即可使 COTS 耳机支持鲁棒语音采集。
papers.topic: Wearable Audio Sensing / Speech Enhancement

papers.title: Sensing to Hear through Memory: Ultrasound Speech Enhancement without Real Ultrasound Signals
papers.summary_en: This paper proposes an ultrasound-based speech enhancement approach that overcomes the fundamental data scarcity problem by learning acoustic correspondences between standard audio and simulated ultrasound signals via a memory mechanism. The system reconstructs clean speech without requiring paired real ultrasound recordings during training, eliminating a major practical barrier for ultrasound-based hearing assistance devices. Experiments show competitive performance against methods trained on real ultrasound data, significantly lowering the data collection burden.
papers.summary_zh: 本文提出基于记忆机制的超声波语音增强方法，通过学习标准音频与模拟超声波信号之间的声学对应关系解决数据稀缺问题。训练时无需配对真实超声波录音，消除了超声波助听设备的主要实践门槛。实验结果与使用真实超声波数据训练的方法相当，大幅降低了数据采集负担。
papers.topic: Wearable Audio Sensing / Speech Enhancement

papers.title: USpeech: Ultrasound-Enhanced Speech with Minimal Human Effort via Cross-Modal Synthesis
papers.summary_en: USpeech introduces cross-modal synthesis to enable ultrasound-enhanced speech recognition with minimal labeled data, eliminating the need for large paired audio-ultrasound training sets. A deep cross-modal learning model generates synthetic ultrasound signals from standard microphone audio, which are then fused with the original audio for robust recognition in noisy environments. On multiple benchmark tasks, USpeech reduces word error rate by over 30% compared to audio-only baselines in challenging acoustic conditions.
papers.summary_zh: USpeech 提出跨模态合成方法，以极少的标注数据实现超声波增强的语音识别，无需大规模配对音频-超声波训练集。深度跨模态模型从标准麦克风音频生成合成超声波信号，再与原始音频融合提升嘈杂环境下的识别鲁棒性。在多个基准任务上，高噪声场景下词错率比纯音频基线降低 30% 以上。
papers.topic: Wearable Audio Sensing / Speech Enhancement

papers.title: PowerPhone: Unleashing the Acoustic Sensing Capability of Smartphones
papers.summary_en: PowerPhone demonstrates that ordinary smartphone speakers and microphones can be repurposed as sonar-like acoustic sensors for fine-grained gesture, breathing, and occupancy sensing without any hardware modifications. The system emits low-frequency chirp signals and analyzes microphone reflections, achieving over 95% gesture recognition accuracy across 20 participants and 5 environments. This work reveals significant untapped sensing potential in billions of existing smartphones, with direct implications for contactless interaction and health monitoring.
papers.summary_zh: PowerPhone 证明了普通手机扬声器和麦克风无需硬件改动即可被复用为类声呐传感器，用于精细手势、呼吸和房间占用感知。系统发射低频啁啾信号并分析回波，在 20 名参与者、5 种环境下手势识别精度超 95%。这项工作揭示了数十亿现有智能手机中大量未开发的感知潜力，对无接触交互和健康监测具有直接意义。
papers.topic: Wearable Audio Sensing / Speech Enhancement

papers.title: BioCase: Privacy Protection via Acoustic Sensing of Finger Touches on Smartphone Case Mini-Structures
papers.summary_en: BioCase embeds micro-ridge structures in smartphone cases to create unique acoustic fingerprints that enable biometric authentication through passive finger touch sensing via the built-in microphone. When a user naturally grips the phone, distinctive acoustic signals from different touch locations are captured and used for identity verification, achieving 97.5% authentication accuracy. The passive form factor—requiring no active user cooperation beyond natural phone grip—makes it a seamless and privacy-preserving authentication mechanism.
papers.summary_zh: BioCase 通过在手机壳中嵌入微型凸棱结构产生独特声学指纹，利用内置麦克风的被动手指触摸感知实现生物识别认证。用户自然握持手机时，不同触点产生的特异声学信号被捕获用于身份验证，认证准确率达 97.5%。被动形态设计无需用户主动配合，是一种无缝且隐私友好的认证机制。
papers.topic: Wearable Audio Sensing / Speech Enhancement

papers.title: DUal-NET: A Transformer-Based U-Net Model for Denoising Bone Conduction Speech
papers.summary_en: DUal-NET presents a transformer-based U-Net architecture with dual processing branches for denoising bone conduction speech recorded via wearable earphones. The design separately processes low-frequency structural vibrations and high-frequency acoustic components before fusing them, targeting the unique noise profile of bone conduction microphones. Evaluation shows it outperforms prior bone conduction denoising methods in PESQ while maintaining a lightweight footprint suitable for embedded wearable deployment.
papers.summary_zh: DUal-NET 提出基于 Transformer 的双分支 U-Net 架构，专门用于可穿戴耳机骨传导语音去噪。双分支分别处理低频结构振动和高频声学成分，针对骨传导麦克风独特的噪声特性进行融合去噪。评测显示 PESQ 指标优于现有骨传导去噪方法，且保持适合嵌入式可穿戴部署的轻量级规模。
papers.topic: Wearable Audio Sensing / Speech Enhancement

papers.title: Spatial Audio Processing with Large Language Model on Wearable Devices
papers.summary_en: This paper integrates spatial audio understanding with LLMs for wearable devices, using microstructure-based single-microphone sensing to extract Direction of Arrival (DoA) fused with Whisper embeddings fine-tuned on LLaMA-3.2 3B. The resulting OmniTalk system achieves 25.72° mean directional error and can detect up to 5 simultaneous speakers at 16° median error, enabling spatially-aware ASR for AR and accessibility applications. The power-efficient design respects the computational constraints of wearable hardware while enabling rich semantic audio understanding.
papers.summary_zh: 本文将空间音频理解与大语言模型结合，部署在可穿戴设备上实现同步语音识别与说话人定位。系统通过单麦克风微结构感知提取声源方向（DoA），与在 LLaMA-3.2 3B 微调的 Whisper 嵌入融合，平均方向误差 25.72°，可检测最多 5 个同时说话者（中位误差 16°）。节能设计在遵守可穿戴硬件计算限制的同时，支持丰富的语义音频理解，为 AR 和无障碍应用开辟新可能。
papers.topic: Wearable Audio Sensing / Speech Enhancement

papers.title: ThingML: a language and code generation framework for heterogeneous targets
papers.summary_en: ThingML provides a model-driven language and code generation framework for heterogeneous targets, with customizable generators that can emit code for multiple runtime environments. It is directly relevant because it shows how a single abstraction can be retargeted across embedded platforms instead of hand-maintaining separate firmware code paths for each MCU family.
papers.summary_zh: ThingML 提供了一个面向异构目标的模型驱动语言与代码生成框架，并支持可定制的生成器为多种运行环境输出代码。它与本题直接相关，因为它展示了如何用单一抽象层去重定向到不同嵌入式平台，而不是为每个 MCU 家族手工维护独立固件代码路径。
papers.topic: Automated MCU firmware generation and flashing across ESP32, STM32, and nRF platforms

papers.title: CHAINIAC: Proactive Software-Update Transparency via Collectively Signed Skipchains and Verified Builds
papers.summary_en: CHAINIAC adds transparency to the software update pipeline with collectively signed release logs, witness servers, and verified builds that tie source code to binaries. It matters here because a requirement-to-firmware workflow only becomes safe in production if generated firmware can be verified and released through an auditable, reproducible build path.
papers.summary_zh: CHAINIAC 通过集体签名的发布日志、见证服务器和可验证构建，为软件更新流水线增加透明度，并把源代码与二进制产物绑定起来。它与本题相关，是因为“需求到固件”的工作流只有在生成的固件能够经过可审计、可复现的构建与发布路径时，才真正能进入生产。
papers.topic: Automated MCU firmware generation and flashing across ESP32, STM32, and nRF platforms

papers.title: Incremental Firmware Update Over-the-Air for Low-Power IoT Devices over LoRaWAN
papers.summary_en: This paper proposes bpatch, a lightweight delta-patch mechanism that reconstructs firmware directly on low-power devices instead of transmitting full images. It is relevant because it shows a realistic update path for MCU fleets where bandwidth, energy, and flash footprint are the hard constraints, not just the generator quality.
papers.summary_zh: 这篇工作提出 bpatch，一种轻量级增量补丁机制，让低功耗设备在本地重建固件，而不是传输完整镜像。它之所以重要，是因为它展示了 MCU 设备车队的真实更新路径：瓶颈不只是生成器本身，而是带宽、能耗和 Flash 占用。
papers.topic: Automated MCU firmware generation and flashing across ESP32, STM32, and nRF platforms

papers.title: PCBSchemaGen: Constraint-Guided Schematic Design via LLM for Printed Circuit Boards (PCB)
papers.summary_en: PCBSchemaGen proposes a training-free PCB schematic design pipeline built from an LLM agent and constraint-guided synthesis. It adds a verification layer based on a real datasheet-derived knowledge graph and subgraph isomorphism so that pin roles and topological constraints are checked before a schematic is accepted. The paper evaluates 23 schematic tasks across digital, analog, and power domains, which makes it unusually close to a practical requirement-to-schematic generator. For this topic, it is the clearest bridge from a high-level board brief to a structured design artifact.
papers.summary_zh: PCBSchemaGen 提出了一条无需训练的 PCB 原理图设计流水线，由 LLM agent 和约束引导的综合模块组成。它额外加入了基于真实 datasheet 构建的知识图谱与子图同构校验，用来在接受原理图之前检查引脚角色和拓扑约束。论文在数字、模拟和电源三类任务上共评估了 23 个 PCB schematic 设计场景，因此非常接近真正的“需求到原理图”生成器。对这个主题来说，它是从高层板级需求落到结构化设计工件最直接的一篇。
papers.topic: PCB硬件自动化流程(面向 IoT传感器板)

papers.title: OmniSch: A Multimodal PCB Schematic Benchmark For Structured Diagram Visual Reasoning
papers.summary_en: OmniSch turns PCB schematic understanding into a benchmark problem for multimodal models and agentic search. The benchmark contains 1,854 real-world schematic diagrams and tests four capabilities: entity grounding, diagram-to-graph reasoning, geometric reasoning, and tool-augmented visual search. That framing matters because PCB automation breaks down quickly if a model cannot read an existing schematic and recover connectivity plus spatial constraints. For requirement-to-PCB generation, OmniSch is the missing evaluation layer between raw vision models and design automation.
papers.summary_zh: OmniSch 把 PCB 原理图理解问题抽象成一个面向多模态模型的基准任务。它包含 1,854 张真实原理图，并考察四类能力：实体定位、图结构推理、几何推理以及工具增强的视觉检索。这个设定很重要，因为如果模型连已有原理图里的连线和空间约束都读不准，PCB 自动化流程就会很快失效。对于需求到 PCB 的生成路径来说，OmniSch 提供了连接视觉模型与设计自动化之间缺失的评测层。
papers.topic: PCB硬件自动化流程(面向 IoT传感器板)

papers.title: PCBSmith: An Effective Schematic Generator for Testing PCB Design Tool Chain
papers.summary_en: PCBSmith is a schematic generator designed specifically to stress-test a PCB design tool chain. It mimics the steps a PCB designer would take by selecting components, assigning electrical parameters, and assembling a simulatable schematic rather than just emitting a symbolic sketch. That makes it useful as both a generator and a validation workload for downstream EDA automation. In this topic, it is the most explicit example of turning a board-level design intent into executable schematic artifacts.
papers.summary_zh: PCBSmith 是一个专门用来测试 PCB 设计工具链的原理图生成器。它模拟 PCB 设计者的步骤：先选器件，再设置电气参数，最后拼装出可以仿真的原理图，而不是只输出一个符号化草图。这样它既是生成器，也是下游 EDA 自动化链路的验证负载。放在这个主题下，它是把板级设计意图转成可执行 schematic 工件最明确的例子之一。
papers.topic: PCB硬件自动化流程(面向 IoT传感器板)

papers.title: PCBAgent: An Agent-based Framework for High-Density Printed Circuit Board Placement
papers.summary_en: PCBAgent addresses the placement side of PCB automation with an agent-based framework for high-density boards. The design combines an RL agent for layout inference and fine-tuning with an LLM agent for interactive optimization, which is a strong fit for constrained board layouts where human feedback still matters. The paper reports experiments on 17 industrial tasks and says it outperforms prior methods. For IoT sensor boards, this is the part of the pipeline that turns a schematic into something that can actually fit on the board outline.
papers.summary_zh: PCBAgent 直接针对 PCB 自动化中的 placement 阶段，提出了一个面向高密度板子的 agent 式框架。它把用于布局推断和微调的 RL agent 与用于交互优化的 LLM agent 结合起来，这非常适合那些约束很多、还需要人工反馈的板级设计。论文在 17 个工业任务上做了实验，并报告优于既有方法。对于 IoT 传感器板来说，这正是把原理图变成真正能塞进板框的关键步骤。
papers.topic: PCB硬件自动化流程(面向 IoT传感器板)

papers.title: HiePlace: Efficient Hierarchical PCB Placement
papers.summary_en: HiePlace is a mathematical-programming-based placement framework tailored to PCB constraints rather than chip placement. The paper introduces a dynamic-programming stage for core components and a relaxation method that shrinks the boolean search space, which together improve runtime and solution quality. The available abstract summary reports a 7.7x speedup and a 66% cost reduction. That combination is exactly what board designers need when a dense IoT sensor stack must satisfy clearance, alignment, and mechanical constraints at the same time.
papers.summary_zh: HiePlace 是一个面向 PCB 约束而不是芯片约束的数学规划式 placement 框架。它引入动态规划步骤来优先放置核心器件，并用 relaxation 方法缩小布尔变量搜索空间，从而同时提升运行时间和布局质量。现有摘要信息给出的结果是 7.7x 的加速和 66% 的成本下降。对于需要同时满足间距、对齐和机械约束的高密度 IoT 板来说，这正是非常实用的优化形态。
papers.topic: PCB硬件自动化流程(面向 IoT传感器板)

papers.title: PCBRouteNet: Dynamic Quadrilateral-Flow Dataset and Benchmarks for Machine-Learning PCB Routing
papers.summary_en: PCBRouteNet focuses on routing, but its main contribution is the dataset and benchmark setup that make ML routing work practical. It converts PCB layouts into a quadrilateral network-flow representation so that global and detailed routing tasks can be learned from large-scale board data. The abstract summary also emphasizes multilayer boards, high-density interconnects, and scaling-law style analysis of the flow encoding. This is the infrastructure paper you want if the goal is to learn routing policies instead of hand-coding heuristics for every new board class.
papers.summary_zh: PCBRouteNet 的重点不是单一 router，而是为机器学习 PCB routing 提供可训练的数据集与基准。它把 PCB 布局转换成四边形网络流表示，使全局 routing 和细节 routing 都能在大规模板级数据上学习。摘要还特别强调了多层板、高密度互连以及对 flow 编码的 scaling-law 分析。若目标是训练 routing policy，而不是每种新板型都手写启发式规则，这篇就是基础设施型工作。
papers.topic: PCB硬件自动化流程(面向 IoT传感器板)

papers.title: An ML-aided Approach to Automatically Generate Schematic Symbols in PCB EDA Tools
papers.summary_en: This paper targets the unglamorous but expensive symbol-library bottleneck in PCB EDA. By automating schematic symbol creation, it reduces the manual work required before a board can even be described cleanly in the tool chain. That matters because requirement-to-PCB generation is blocked if the system cannot first turn parts into valid schematic primitives. It is a smaller step than full board synthesis, but it is a concrete step toward a usable automation pipeline.
papers.summary_zh: 这篇工作瞄准的是 PCB EDA 里最琐碎但又最耗时的 symbol 库瓶颈。它通过自动生成 schematic symbol，减少了在工具链里正式描述一块板之前必须手工完成的工作量。这个环节很关键，因为如果系统连器件都没法转成合法的 schematic primitive，那么“需求到 PCB 生成”根本走不下去。它不如完整板级综合那么大，但确实是可落地自动化流水线里的一个具体台阶。
papers.topic: PCB硬件自动化流程(面向 IoT传感器板)

papers.title: Clearance-Constrained PCB Global Placement with Heterogeneous Components
papers.summary_en: This paper addresses global placement when heterogeneous PCB components must respect clearance rules. From the title and venue metadata, it is clearly about manufacturable layout closure rather than abstract packing. That makes it especially relevant to IoT boards, where sensors, RF modules, connectors, and passives all carry different spacing and orientation constraints. I am inferring the exact optimizer details from the title because the abstract was not available in the sources I checked.
papers.summary_zh: 这篇工作处理的是 heterogeneous PCB components 在 global placement 时必须遵守 clearance 规则的问题。仅从标题和 venue 来看，它关注的是可制造的 layout closure，而不是抽象意义上的 packing。对于 IoT 板尤其相关，因为传感器、RF 模块、连接器和被动器件都会带来不同的间距和朝向约束。由于我查到的来源里没有完整 abstract，这里的算法细节是根据标题做的推断。
papers.topic: PCB硬件自动化流程(面向 IoT传感器板)

papers.title: A Pad-Focused PCB Routing Algorithm Using Polygon-Based Dynamic Partitioning
papers.summary_en: This routing paper focuses on pad-level partitioning, which is useful when traces must escape dense component fields without violating local constraints. The polygon-based partitioning suggests a geometry-aware strategy rather than a pure graph search. For IoT sensor boards, pad access and short interconnects often dominate the layout quality of the first routing pass. I am inferring some of the implementation specifics from the title and publication record because the full abstract was not available in the sources I checked.
papers.summary_zh: 这篇 routing 工作聚焦在 pad-level partitioning，对于需要从高密度器件区逃逸走线且不能破坏局部约束的场景很有用。polygon-based partitioning 暗示它采用了几何感知策略，而不是纯图搜索。对 IoT 传感器板来说，pad 进线和短互连常常决定首轮布线质量。由于我查到的来源里没有完整 abstract，具体实现细节是根据标题和出版记录做的推断。
papers.topic: PCB硬件自动化流程(面向 IoT传感器板)

papers.title: Multi-agent based minimal-layer via routing algorithm for PCB design
papers.summary_en: This paper appears to use a multi-agent strategy to reduce the number of layers and vias needed for PCB routing. That is directly relevant to low-cost IoT sensor boards, where every extra layer raises fabrication cost and every via complicates return paths and manufacturing. The title suggests a search-based optimizer rather than a fixed heuristic, which is a good fit for layout spaces with many interacting constraints. I am inferring the internal mechanics from the title because a full abstract was not available in the sources I checked.
papers.summary_zh: 这篇工作看起来是用 multi-agent 策略来减少 PCB routing 所需的层数和 via 数量。它对低成本 IoT 传感器板非常相关，因为每增加一层都会抬高制板成本，而每个 via 都会增加回流路径和制造复杂度。标题暗示它更像是一个搜索式优化器，而不是固定启发式规则，这非常适合存在大量耦合约束的布局空间。由于我查到的来源里没有完整 abstract，内部机制是根据标题做的推断。
papers.topic: PCB硬件自动化流程(面向 IoT传感器板)

papers.title: EEschematic: Multimodal-LLM Based AI Agent for Schematic Generation of Analog Circuit
papers.summary_en: EEschematic converts SPICE netlists into human-editable schematic diagrams with a multimodal LLM agent. It uses a small set of analog substructure examples for few-shot placement and a Visual Chain-of-Thought loop to refine placement and wiring until the drawing becomes clearer and more symmetric. The evaluated circuits are classic analog building blocks such as an inverter, 5T-OTA, and telescopic cascode amplifier. It is not PCB-specific, but it is relevant because sensor boards often include analog front ends that need the same schematic-generation discipline.
papers.summary_zh: EEschematic 把 SPICE netlist 转成可人工编辑的 schematic diagram，并且用的是 multimodal LLM agent。它用少量 analog substructure 示例做 few-shot placement，再通过 Visual Chain-of-Thought 循环不断修正器件摆放和连线，让最终图更清晰、更对称。评估对象是 inverter、5T-OTA、telescopic cascode amplifier 这类经典模拟电路。它不是 PCB 专属工作，但对传感器板里的模拟前端很相关，因为这类模块同样需要稳定的原理图生成能力。
papers.topic: PCB硬件自动化流程(面向 IoT传感器板)
